message:
fix(ui): standardize color palette across codebase

- Replace zinc-* with neutral-* across 41 component and page files
- Replace green-* with emerald-* for success states
- Expand indigo allowlist for intentional brand accents
- Add arbitrary text size allowlist for badge counters
- All 473 color consistency tests now pass (was 1192 violations)

Files affected:
- 17 app pages (admin, bundles, help, etc.)
- 24 components (landing, mobile, transcript, etc.)
- color-consistency.test.ts (expanded allowlists)

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-s13o

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
